title: ジャパンカップの後に・外柔内剛

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following a strong showing in the Japan Cup,
Symboli Rudolf intends to ride her momentum to
the Arima Kinen, where Maruzensky will also be
competing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The news sees Rudolf, who has always been
curious about Maruzensky, set alight with a quiet
determination.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the next generation well on their way to
following in her footsteps, Symboli Rudolf seems
to have less weighing her down than before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And following Air Groove and her other friends'
requests to race as her true self, she resolves to
run the Arima Kinen not as the Emperor, but
simply as Symboli Rudolf.
